attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.RTV_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.CARTON_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.DELIVERY_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.OPERATING_UNIT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ORDER_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SLC_INT_SLC_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SLC_INT_SLC_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SHIP_PREFERENCE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SHIP_TO, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SHIP_FROM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.TELESERVICE_CASE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.HOLD_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ROUTE_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.CANCEL_HOLD_OVERRIDE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ORG_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE,
 (
 select ORDER_NUMBER ,SHIP_SET_NUMBER ,CARTON_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE
 minus
 select ORDER_NUMBER ,SHIP_SET_NUMBER ,CARTON_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ORDER_NUMBER = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.ORDER_NUMBER and ACM.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.SHIP_SET_NUMBER and ACM.CARTON_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.CARTON_NUMBER and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME
